It is also classified under the order Caryophyllales and the class Magnoliopsida. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics, such as its leaf and flower morphology. intro: Antimima modesta is a succulent plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the family Aizoaceae. Traditionally, Antimima modesta has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which provide relief and promote healing. The bioactive constituents of Antimima modesta include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal effects.
